name: excalidraw-skill
description: Agent skill for creating, rendering, and validating Excalidraw architecture and workflow diagrams in Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, Kiro, Roo Code, and more.

scripts.test: npm run build && node ./bin/excalidraw-skill.js --help && node ./bin/excalidraw-skill.js install --ai codex --dry-run && node ./bin/excalidraw-skill.js install --ai claude --dry-run && node ./bin/excalidraw-skill.js install --ai gemini --dry-run && node ./bin/excalidraw-skill.js install --ai cursor --dry-run && node ./bin/excalidraw-skill.js install --ai copilot --dry-run && node ./bin/excalidraw-skill.js install --ai all --dry-run && node ./bin/excalidraw-skill.js install --ai gemni --dry-run

author: Dave Nguyen
